title: Quarterly Operations Report
subtitle: A Jinja-based report layout for compact, readable PDF summaries.

sections.heading: Executive summary
body: Performance remained stable through the quarter, with most milestones delivered on schedule and no major operational failures.
The main gap was uneven follow-through on a small number of cross-functional action items.

sections.heading: Key observations
items: Turnaround time improved after template standardisation
Most avoidable delays came from incomplete handoff information
Escalations were concentrated in one workflow rather than spread evenly
sections.notice: Recommendation: standardise intake fields before adding more reporting layers.
